brief: Today's news highlights the deaths of Senator Lindsey Graham and actor Sam Neill, alongside escalating US-Iran tensions that sent oil prices soaring and a deadly bar fire in Bangkok. Research papers focus on AI coding assistants and wearable sensing in high-stakes contexts.
news_summary: Republican Senator Lindsey Graham and actor Sam Neill have died; US-Iran strikes over the Strait of Hormuz have caused oil prices to leap and markets to fall; a bar fire in Bangkok has killed at least 27 people.
papers_summary: Papers explore configurable AI coding assistants for developer control and the behavioral implications of mandatory wearable sensing in institutions.

en.brief: Today's news highlights the deaths of Senator Lindsey Graham and actor Sam Neill, alongside escalating US-Iran tensions that sent oil prices soaring and a deadly bar fire in Bangkok. Research papers focus on AI coding assistants and wearable sensing in high-stakes contexts.
en.news_summary: Republican Senator Lindsey Graham and actor Sam Neill have died; US-Iran strikes over the Strait of Hormuz have caused oil prices to leap and markets to fall; a bar fire in Bangkok has killed at least 27 people.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore configurable AI coding assistants for developer control and the behavioral implications of mandatory wearable sensing in institutions.

zh.brief: 今日焦點包括Pokemon Go十週年、曼谷酒吧大火致27死、台灣曾現蹤的食腦微生物威脅擴大，以及颱風巴威登陸浙江。國際方面，美國參議員葛理漢和演員山姆·尼爾去世。
zh.news_summary: 優先中文新聞涵蓋Pokemon Go十週年、曼谷酒吧大火、食腦微生物、高溫對女性影響及颱風巴威。國際新聞中，美國參議員葛理漢和演員山姆·尼爾逝世。

todays_image.caption: Just as Lobophora sp. algae can undergo a rapid, unforeseen bloom that disrupts its ecosystem, Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden illness abruptly ended a long-standing political presence.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
